findings.summary: The policy explicitly grants users the right to challenge automated decisions restricting platform access by contacting support.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request deletion of their personal information in certain jurisdictions.
The policy discloses the use of automated tools for content translation and states limitations on their accuracy, implying transparency about AI usage.
The policy discloses that the services use AI and large language models with limitations in accuracy, reliability, and safety.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request deletion of their personal data collected via services, subject to exceptions.
The policy explicitly states that users have the right to lodge complaints with supervisory authorities, including EU ones.
The policy grants users the right to request a review of decisions made solely based on automated processing.
The policy describes using algorithmic and human review for content moderation, implying human oversight over AI-assisted decisions.
The policy grants users the ability to delete shared photos, videos, comments, albums, and files from iCloud storage at any time.
The policy informs users of their right to lodge a complaint with the applicable regulator regarding privacy rights.
The policy discloses use of foundational AI models trained on publicly crawled web data via Applebot, with limitations on personal data usage and no profiling.
The policy explicitly provides opportunity for human review on any significant automated decisions using algorithms or profiling.
The policy discloses the use of algorithms for personalized ranking and lists key parameters influencing results, implying transparency about AI usage.
The policy acknowledges users' ability to request deletion of their information, which may limit service access, aligning with the right to erasure.
The policy explicitly states that users have the right to lodge a complaint with the relevant supervisory authority.
The policy describes AI limitations including unpredictability, inaccuracy, and potential offensiveness, fulfilling disclosure duties.
The policy explicitly references interactions with 'automated AI character' and 'AI-generated chats', informing users of AI involvement.
The policy recognizes users' legal right to delete their personal information and processes such requests.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request deletion of their personal information associated with AIs, subject to exceptions.
The policy describes collecting data from interactions with AI at Meta, disclosing AI usage in products and data practices.
The policy references user chats and interactions with AI at Meta, indicating disclosure of AI system interactions.
Policy describes manual human review supplementing automated processing of user information.
The policy describes using facial recognition technology for account verification and face analysis for detecting impersonation, implying biometric identification practices.
The policy grants users the option to request review of content removal decisions, implying contestation of potentially automated moderation outcomes.
The policy explicitly states users can delete their information, granting the right to erasure.
The policy describes using machine learning for age determination, disclosing AI usage to users as part of transparency obligations.
The policy informs users they can contact local data protection authorities with concerns about their rights.
The policy discloses the use of AI bots for scanning messages and facilitating tasks like scheduling and summarizing, implying transparency about AI usage.
The policy informs users they may interact with AI features that automate content generation, even if not always labeled as AI.
The policy describes a 'social selling index' score based on personal account activity shared with employers, implying evaluation of social behavior for potential detrimental treatment.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request erasure or deletion of their personal data when no longer necessary.
The policy references additional user rights to redress and appeal decisions impacting them, aligning with contesting automated processing.
The policy discloses AI usage in generating assets and explicitly notes limitations in performance and suitability.
The policy explicitly grants European users the right to request deletion of their personal data.
The policy informs users that they are interacting with an AI system for generating assets from prompts.
The policy describes ChatGPT's functioning and limitations on factual accuracy, implying disclosure of AI capabilities and limitations.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to delete their personal information, corresponding to the right to erasure.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to lodge a complaint with their local supervisory authority if an issue is not adequately addressed.
The policy instructs users on how to request information about account limitations, holds, or reserves based on automated risk assessments, implying a right to explanation for significant decisions.
The policy provides notice of account limitations and grants users an opportunity to request restoration by providing information for review.
Policy discloses use of AI, automated decision-making, purposes like risk assessment, and limitations for agentic AI.
Describes profiling techniques for predictive assessments of criminal risks like money laundering and fraud.
Policy informs users they interact with Agentic AI Tools, which are AI systems accessing personal information.
Policy explicitly states users' right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority if a privacy request is denied.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to delete their personal information through account settings or requests, with legal exceptions.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request account deletion, aligning with the right to erasure of personal data.
The policy references using user content to train AI models, disclosing AI usage practices.
The policy grants users the right to request manual human review of automated decisions made about them.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request deletion of their personal data under specified conditions.
The policy explicitly informs users they can complain to local data protection authorities about handling of personal data.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request deletion of their personal data, with specified methods and exceptions.
The policy states users' right not to be subject to significant automated decision-making including profiling, aligning with contestation rights.
The policy references the use of AI and machine learning models for developing features and personalization, disclosing AI usage.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request erasure of their personal data when no longer needed or consent withdrawn.
The policy grants users the right to be notified about automated decision-making and profiling, including logic, significance, and consequences.
The policy grants users the right to object to profiling in automated decision-making under certain circumstances.
The policy informs users of their right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office if data processing infringes GDPR.
The policy explicitly grants users the right to request deletion of their personal data collected by the platform.
The policy grants users the right to object to and stop automated individual decisions, including profiling, implying human review.
The policy grants users the right to lodge complaints with the National Privacy Commission regarding data privacy issues.
The policy describes evaluating users based on social behavior like likes, follows, and engagement to personalize the For You Feed, implying social scoring.
Scanning and analyzing user messages to prevent and detect crime implies prohibited predictive profiling for criminal offences.
The policy discloses the use of automated systems for content analysis and personalization, implying transparency about AI usage and capabilities.
The terms describe AI usage through references to user inputs, prompts, outputs, and content recommendations based on engagement factors.
The policy confirms compliance with user deletion requests after identity verification, thereby granting the right to erasure of personal data.
The policy describes using facial recognition on submitted photos for identity verification, implying biometric identification practices.
The policy explicitly instructs users to contact customer support to object to automated deactivations and fee adjustments, providing human review.
The policy describes evaluating users based on ratings and feedback for compliance with guidelines, leading to deactivation as detrimental treatment.
The policy explicitly allows users to request deletion of their accounts and data, subject to legal exceptions, granting the right to erasure.
